GpuGlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=10
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
    GpuScanExec: batch_size=8012998
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=1340
GpuGlobalLimitExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, estimate_input_bytes=268, estimate_output_bytes=268, estimate_cost=536
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, estimate_input_bytes=268, estimate_output_bytes=268, estimate_cost=536
    GpuScanExec: row_width=268, subtree_max_row_bytes=268, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=268, estimate_cost=268
